Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Nexar Tank Enemy Nexar Tank
  • Engine: Enemy Nexar Tank
  • Loot: Artifact 30%, Alien Alloy, Fusion Core, Big Metal Scrap, Radiated Junk, Artifact 100%, Crate Steel 1-2k, Crate Steel 2-4k, Crate Steel 5-10k, Artifact 1%
  • Weapon: Enemy Nexar Gatling Gun range 0-750
